meaning: n.疯草病,疯子,火车头vt.用疯草毒害adj.发疯的,发狂的
examples: Outline based on the early loco type, with typical Shay features.
From the cab of the little green wheezing loco, the driver waved. I waved back.
I'm doing a keynote presentation today at the Geo Loco Conference in San Francisco.
Be careful with the Rojo Loco, however, as it packs quite a punch, just like James.
The Adventuredome also just announced the debut of the record-breaking "El Loco" coaster in December 2013.
